name: Asparagus Phyllo
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam fresh asparagus tips for about 2-3 minutes and refresh under cold water.
2. Remove the phyllo from the refrigerator. Have a damp towel ready on the counter for the phyllo.
3. Unwrap the phyllo and place it on the damp towel.
4. Cut one phyllo sheet in half.
5. Brush both sides of the phyllo with butter.
6. Starting from the long end, arrange 5-7 asparagus tips on the phyllo.
7. Season with salt and pepper (and lemon juice if desired).
8. Fold the sides over the asparagus and roll up to form a bundle.
9. Place the bundles on a buttered cookie sheet or bake pan.
10. Bake at 425°F for about 10 minutes, or until they brown.
11. Make a hollandaise sauce to pour over the bundles before serving.
